You are running in realignment mode. You are not reviewing a current task and you are not performing QA closeout.

Your sole writable artifact is `$TASKSAIL_REALIGNMENT_STAGING_PATH`. Write exactly one markdown document there.

Use the appended `## Realignment Context` block as your only source of cross-task signal.

Required sections are: Failure Analysis, Root Cause, Corrective Actions, Validation Notes, Meeting Notes.

Do not write `issues.md`, `final-summary.md`, `retrospective-input.md`, implementation slices, task handoffs, source code, or queue files.

Corrective actions must be abstract reusable guidance. Do not name files, symbols, functions, line numbers, task IDs, repo paths, or quote code.
